title: Sign in and reach the dashboard
description: This test verifies that a valid user can sign in and arrive at the dashboard landing page.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}

title: Create a product from a parsed SKU and save it
description: This test verifies that a user can enter a SKU, review parsed product data, and save a new product successfully.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the new product is created
Verify the saved product appears in the product view

title: Generate documents for filtered products and download the export
description: This test verifies that a user can filter products, choose a template, generate documents, and complete a bulk export download.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify generated documents are available to download

title: Create a product from SKU parsing and save it
description: This test verifies that a user can create a new product, parse its SKU, review the generated naming fields, and save the product successfully.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Fill in a valid SKU into the SKU field
Fill in the product naming fields with valid bilingual values
Verify the new product is created
Verify the product details are displayed

title: Review pending validation items and open a product for fixing
description: This test verifies that an operator can review pending validation issues and open a product edit workflow from the report.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Click the link to view pending validation items
Verify a list of products with pending issues is displayed
Verify at least one product can be opened for editing

title: Review pending products and resolve a blocking issue
description: This test verifies that a user can review incomplete products in the pending queue and open a product to resolve the issue before export.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Open a pending product for review
Update the missing required product information
Verify the product no longer appears as blocked for validation
Verify the product is ready for export

title: Preview and confirm a bulk product import
description: This test verifies that an operator can upload a completed import file, review the preview, and confirm execution.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Click the link to open mass product import
Verify the imported products are reflected in the results

title: Generate bilingual product naming from a SKU
description: This test verifies that SKU parsing leads to generated Spanish and English product names before saving.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Review the generated Spanish product name
Translate the product name to English
Verify both language names are displayed
Verify the product is ready to save

title: Save a new bilingual product naming record
description: This test verifies that a product manager can complete a new product with Spanish and English naming and save it successfully.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Click the link to create a new product
Fill in a valid SKU into the SKU field
Fill in the product name in Spanish
Fill in the product name in English
Verify a success confirmation is visible
Verify the newly created product record is displayed

title: Download the mass import template
description: This test verifies that an operator can start the bulk import workflow by downloading the provided template.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Click the link to open mass product import
Click the control to download the import template
Verify the template download action is available

title: Identify critical pending issues in the validation report
description: This test verifies that an operator can scan the pending report and distinguish critical from warning issues before continuing.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Click the link to view pending validation items
Verify validation severity indicators are displayed
Verify issue reason codes are displayed

title: Build and save a new template
description: This test verifies that a template designer can create a new template, set its basic properties, place elements on the canvas, bind data fields, and save the template.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Set the template name, dimensions, and orientation
Add an element to the canvas
Bind the element to a data field
Verify the saved template appears in the builder

title: Search references and apply a mass update
description: This test verifies that an operator can search references by family code, select multiple results, and confirm a mass update that is reflected in the editor.

steps.description: Update reference fields and JSONB attribute values
Verify the selected references reflect the updated values

title: View dashboard metrics and recent activity
description: This test verifies that a signed-in user can review the dashboard overview content after login.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify recent product activity is displayed

title: Upload an asset and manage its metadata
description: This test verifies that a user can upload a multimedia asset, find it in the gallery, edit its metadata, and save the changes.

steps.description: Upload a file with a name and type classification
View the asset in the gallery
Verify the uploaded asset appears with the updated metadata

title: Search and mass update families
description: This test verifies that a family manager can search for families, select multiple results, apply a mass update, and see the updated families reflected in the list.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Search for families using a code, name, line, or zone
Verify the selected families are updated
Verify the updated families remain visible in the list

title: Manage glossary terms with bilingual values
description: This test verifies that a catalog manager can add a glossary term with Spanish and English values and save it.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Click the link to open the glossary manager
Fill in the Spanish value field
Fill in the English value field
Verify the new glossary term is displayed in the list

title: Import a dataset and save it
description: This test verifies that a user can import a CSV or Excel dataset, map columns, preview the rows, and save the dataset successfully.

steps.description: Upload a valid CSV or Excel file
Verify the dataset appears in the saved datasets list

title: Edit an existing template and save changes
description: This test verifies that a user can open an existing template, adjust its layout and element styling, and save the updates.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Reposition an element on the canvas
Verify the template update is saved
Verify the edited template remains available

title: Add a new color code
description: This test verifies that a user can create a new SAP color entry and see it appear in the color list.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Add a new color code with a valid SAP name
Verify the new color appears in the list
Verify the color list remains accessible

title: Add a schema attribute to selected families
description: This test verifies that a user can add a JSONB schema attribute across multiple families and confirm the change is applied.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Search for families using a code, name, line, or zone
Add a schema attribute to the selected families
Verify the attribute is added to the selected families
Verify the updated schema attribute is visible

title: Keep incomplete products visible before export
description: This test verifies that incomplete products remain flagged in pending review until the required data is corrected.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Click the link to view pending validation items
Open a product that has blocking issues
Verify blocking validation issues are displayed
Verify the product remains pending until issues are resolved

title: Complete optional product details before saving
description: This test verifies that a user can fill optional product attributes on the new product form and save the record.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the saved product includes the optional details

title: Preview a single product render before bulk export
description: This test verifies that a user can open a single product preview, review the live render, and return with the preview available for export decisions.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the single product preview is displayed
Verify the rendered document content is displayed

title: Add an attribute key to selected references
description: This test verifies that an operator can search for references, select them, add a new attribute key, and save the change successfully.

steps.description: Verify the new attribute key is visible for the selected references

title: Add a new private label client
description: This test verifies that a user can create a client record with a logo and see it added to the client list.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Add a new client with a logo and required details
Verify the new client appears in the list

title: Use a dashboard quick link to continue work
description: This test verifies that a user can open a main module from the dashboard quick links.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Click the quick link to continue into the product creation workflow
Verify the product creation page is displayed

title: Remove a schema attribute from selected families
description: This test verifies that a user can remove a JSONB schema attribute across multiple families and confirm the change is applied.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Search for families using a code, name, line, or zone
Remove a schema attribute from the selected families
Verify the attribute is removed from the selected families
Verify the families still appear in the list

title: Review import changes before execution
description: This test verifies that an operator can inspect the proposed changes from a bulk import before choosing to execute them.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Click the link to open mass product import
Verify a diff preview of proposed changes is displayed
Verify the execution control is available after preview

title: Remove an attribute key from selected references
description: This test verifies that an operator can search for references, select them, remove an attribute key, and confirm the update in the editor.

steps.description: Verify the removed attribute key is no longer shown for the selected references

title: Create a naming rule
description: This test verifies that a user can add a new system rule in the configuration hub and see it listed among the rules.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Create a new naming rule with valid values
Verify the new rule appears in the rules list

title: Link an imported dataset to a template
description: This test verifies that a user can review imported dataset data and complete the wizard to link the dataset to a template.

steps.description: Upload a valid CSV or Excel file
Link the dataset to a template through the wizard
Verify the dataset is linked to a template

title: Edit a glossary term and toggle its active state

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Click the link to open the glossary manager
Open an existing glossary term for editing
Verify the glossary term remains visible in the list
Verify the updated active state is reflected

description: This test verifies that a user can browse the asset gallery, filter or search for an existing asset, delete it, and confirm the removal.

steps.description: Verify the asset is removed from the gallery

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Select an existing color from the list

description: This test verifies that a user can update an existing rule and see the revised values in the configuration list.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Select an existing rule from the list
Verify the updated rule is shown in the list

description: This test verifies that a user can update an existing client record and see the saved details reflected.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Select an existing client from the list

title: Review isometric association suggestions
description: This test verifies that a user can view isometric groups by reference and run smart association suggestions to see proposed matches.

steps.description: Verify suggested matches are displayed for the selected isometric group

title: Create a product by parsing SKU details
description: This test verifies that a product manager can create a new product by entering SKU data and seeing the derived product attributes populated.

Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}

Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}

Verify the product is not created

title: Delete a glossary term with confirmation

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}

title: Delete a naming rule
description: This test verifies that a user can remove a configuration rule after confirming deletion and no longer see it in the list.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Select an existing rule from the list
Verify the deleted rule no longer appears in the list

title: Reject invalid login credentials
description: This test verifies that invalid credentials are rejected and an authentication error is shown.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with invalid@example.com
Fill in the password field with wrong-password
Verify an authentication error message is visible
Verify the dashboard is not displayed
